titleStmt.title: SII 23.497: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 497. (A.R. No. 497 of 1907.) Svāmimalai, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Subrahmaṇya temple—in the same place Śevvappa-Nāyaka. Śaka 1495: 1573-74 A.D.

summary.p: This is built in the middle and also incomplete. The first and second sections together seem to register a gift of 2 vēli of land by Śevvappa-Nāyakkar, son of Timmappa-Nāyakkar of the Chaturtha-gōtra and a native of Neḍuṅguṉṟam in Toṇḍaimaṇḍalam to the temple of Kumārasvāmi at Svāmimalai in Innambar-nāḍu Parāntakanāḍu, a division of Vikramaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu of Tiruchchirāppaḷḷi-chāvaḍi for the abhishēka service of the god and for burning a ‘ghee-lamp’ in the temple, and also for the maintenance of a maṭha called the Vēlāyudhachchivaṉ-maḍam.

A third piece which seems to be part of another inscription is also found close by which mentions Timmuguḍi in Vēmbattūr-śīrmai and gift of a quarter (vēli) of land for the sandhi-abhishēka (of the same god ?) and for a lamp.
The date of the inscription (of Śevvappa-Nāyaka) is given as Tulā, śu. Paurṇamāsi, Saturday, Aśvati (=1573 A.D., October 10).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī . cakāttam 1000 4 100 9 10 5 Itaṉmel cellāniṉ— vaa sarattu tulā nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu pavurṇamāsiyum taiy mantavāra
mum civayogamum peṟṟa Aśvati nakṣatrattu nāḷ śrīcoḻamaṇṭa—ku vaṭakku tiruccirāppaḷḷi Ucāvaṭi vikkiramacoḻavaḷanāṭu Iṉṉampar nāṭu
parāntaka nāṭu cuvāmimalai ciṟicuvāmimalai kumāracuvāmiyāṟku pi— toṇṭamaṇṭalam neṭuṅkuṉṟam catuṟtta kottiṟattu timmappa nāya kkar puttiraṉ
viracevvappanāyakkar Utitta tārāpūṟuvapaṭṭaiyam kuṭuttapaṭi kumāra Apiṣekakayaḷaiyum neyviḷakkukkum velāyutac civaṉ maṭappuṟattukku

kku meṟku nāvalkuṭikku Oṭṭaivāykkālukku teṟku tiruvalañcuḻi Ellai Irācarācarkkula Ellaikku kāveri Āṟu naṭu
kellai Uḷppaṭṭa nañcai puñcai nattañ ceyttalaittiṭar māva ṭai maravaṭai kuḷavaṭai cāraṭai Uḷpaṭa ku
ṉamum taṉmattukku kaṭṭaḷai Iṭa sahiraṇyodaka tārāpūrvamāka dattam paṇṇi(na)napaṭiyiṉāle candrādatyavaraiyum A
velāyutaccivaṟku maṭappuṟattukku patinālaṭiyum vilattaṭik kolālu nañ(ñ)cai nilam Iruveliyum puñcaiyi
marum lekālsiddhi kayaḷaiyum neyviḷakku tarmamum velāyutac civa

Iṉṉāṭu Iruppatu vempattūṟ cirmaiyil timmukuṭi nāṉ ke—
vil kālattukku prā ñca devamanmanniyam paṭṭa vṛttidra
marāca cuvāmiyāṟku kāla canti Apiṣekattukku neyviḷakkukku
valk koḷḷa cetta nañcai puñcaikkuḷa—
lmeṉ puñcai paṭukai puñcai nilam pa Āka puñcai
Digital edition of SII 23.497 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
